name: keeplines-in-table
description: P0: keepLines outside table. Table cell P: keepLines inside table. P2: keepLines outside table (control).
expected_behavior: P0: keep_lines=true (honored). Table cell P: keep_lines=true in XML but Word ignores it in rendering. P2: keep_lines=true (honored).
current_status: GAP — we parse keepLines but don't track table context
